_publications._publicationTitle: The German version of the neurofibromatosis 2 impact on quality of life questionnaire correlates with severity of depression and physician-reported disease severity.

_contextSnippet: The NFTI-QOL-D is a reliable and useful tool to assess patient-reported quality of life in German-speaking patients with NF2.
details: Reliable and useful tool for assessing patient-reported quality of life in German-speaking NF2 patients
